safe_claims.claim: Phase1C learned base-feature MLP reranking improves over the Phase1B scorer on MuSiQue and 2Wiki.
The paper-facing conservative candidate is mlp_base_only_topk_4.

evidence.selected_feature_structure: mlp_base_only: 20 base direct features + MLP nonlinear calibration

safe_claims.claim: The observed Phase1C gain should be described as learned key/edge calibration, not as full structural-proxy feature success.

safe: learned base-feature edge/key calibration is robustly positive on completed Phase1C MuSiQue and 2Wiki validation runs
mlp_base_only_topk_4 is the conservative cross-dataset candidate
unsafe: full Phase1C structural/proxy feature bundle drives the gain
complement selection is the main QA policy
current validation artifact is a hidden-test benchmark claim

unsafe_claims.claim: The full Phase1C structural/proxy feature bundle drives the gain.
unsafe_claims.reason: MuSiQue validation found mlp_base_only stronger than mlp_full_phase1c; structural/proxy features mainly improved support recall.

unsafe_claims.claim: The result is a hidden-test benchmark claim.
unsafe_claims.reason: All artifacts are train-to-dev validation over existing cache outputs.

unsafe_claims.claim: Complement selection is the main QA policy.
unsafe_claims.reason: Complement is useful diagnostically but 2Wiki F1 favors topk_4 and the policy lacks a learned ordering objective.
